Yuan Si иўҒе—Ј
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Si (иўҒе—Ј). Surrendered to Cao Cao in 196. Yuan Si was affiliated with Yuan Shu and the Wei Kingdom.
